text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In honor of her outstanding performance, Taiki
Shuttle receives the URA award for best sprinter.
But the Umamusume of the Year is none other
than Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite the unfortunate results, Taiki refuses to
give up. Citing my faith in her speed, she declares
that she'll be the next Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to conquer all the G1
races—determined to make her speed and power
known to as many people as she can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our ambition renewed, we challenge ourselves
with the Yasuda Kinen—the race to crown the
spring King of the Mile!
